description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 11, 2025 at 4:32 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California made contact 
with the pavement at the parking lot entrance of 785 Moscow Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was in autonomous mode traveling eastbound on Geneva Avenue when it began to turn left into a parking lot at 785 
Moscow Street. As the Waymo AV proceeded northbound into the entrance of the parking lot, the Waymo AV’s undercarriage made 
contact with the pavement at the entrance of the parking lot. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode, and a test driver was present (in the driver’s seating position). The test driver of the Waymo AV alleged minor injuries. 
 
Print
Clear Form
